summary: Complete testing of Stripe Payment Integration feature. All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Payment flow: Admin creates payment request -> gets shareable link -> customer visits /pay/:paymentId -> clicks Pay -> redirects to Stripe Checkout -> returns with confirmation.

backend_payment_endpoints.POST /api/admin/payment-request: PASS - Creates payment with all fields, validates amount > 0, rejects invalid email
backend_payment_endpoints.GET /api/admin/payments: PASS - Lists all payments sorted by date (newest first)
backend_payment_endpoints.GET /api/payment/{payment_id}: PASS - Returns public payment details, 404 for invalid ID
backend_payment_endpoints.POST /api/payment/{payment_id}/checkout: PASS - Creates Stripe checkout session, returns URL
backend_payment_endpoints.GET /api/payment/status/{session_id}: PASS - Returns payment status from Stripe
backend_payment_endpoints.DELETE /api/admin/payment/{payment_id}: PASS - Deletes unpaid payments, rejects paid ones

backend_validation.missing_fields: PASS - Returns 422 for missing required fields
backend_validation.invalid_email: PASS - Returns 422 for invalid email format

frontend_payment_page.valid_payment_id: PASS - Shows payment details, amount, customer name, Pay button

frontend_admin_payments_tab.tab_visibility: PASS - Payments tab visible in Admin Dashboard
frontend_admin_payments_tab.payments_list: PASS - Shows payment rows with status badges, amounts, actions
frontend_admin_payments_tab.create_payment_form: PASS - All fields present (name, email, amount, currency, service_type, description)
frontend_admin_payments_tab.create_payment_submit: PASS - Creates payment and shows in list
frontend_admin_payments_tab.copy_link_button: PASS - Copies payment link to clipboard
frontend_admin_payments_tab.open_link_button: PASS - Opens payment page in new tab

stripe_integration.checkout_session_creation: PASS - Returns valid Stripe checkout URL
stripe_integration.checkout_redirect: PASS - Redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct amount

passed_tests: Frontend: Invalid payment ID shows error
Frontend: Pay button redirects to Stripe
critical_code_review_comments: Payment endpoints correctly use Pydantic validation with Field(gt=0) for amount
Stripe webhook endpoint registered on app directly (not api_router) for correct URL matching
PaymentsTab.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
PaymentPage.jsx handles all states: loading, error, success, polling

test_credentials.note: Reused from iteration_20 for admin dashboard access

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Playwright User payment during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Payment Integration is fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/payment-request (create), GET /api/admin/payments (list), GET /api/payment/{id} (public details), POST /api/payment/{id}/checkout (create Stripe session), GET /api/payment/status/{session_id} (poll status), DELETE /api/admin/payment/{id} (delete unpaid). Frontend: PaymentPage.jsx at /pay/:paymentId, PaymentsTab.jsx in Admin Dashboard. Stripe uses test key sk_test_emergent. Key data-testids: payments-tab, create-payment-btn, payment-form, payment-name, payment-email, payment-amount, payment-currency, payment-service-type, payment-description, submit-payment-btn, payment-search, payment-row-{id}, copy-link-{id}, open-link-{id}, delete-payment-{id}, pay-now-btn, payment-page, payment-success.
